findings: Sonnet 5 matches Opus 4.8 on hard commands (179/180) and stays within a point on hard review, while being the FASTEST of all four models and 1/3 the price.
Haiku 4.5 is both least accurate (v4 122/180, 68%) AND slowest (slowest on v1/v3/v4) - adaptive thinking makes it burn a large token budget, erasing its speed+cost advantage.
Clear tier gap: Sonnet-Haiku differs by 20-30+ points where Opus-4.6-vs-4.8 tied.
